hero.description: Store, share and collaborate with enterprise-grade security. Access your data from anywhere in the world with the speed you deserve.

features.title: Secure and ultra-fast synchronization across all your devices.
features.description: We power your workflow with Nextcloud, the leading ecosystem for storage and backups.

security.title: Advanced Security
security.description: End-to-end encryption with two-factor authentication to protect your data.

speed.title: Ultra Fast Speed
speed.description: Global CDN with servers in over 50 locations for instant access.

collaboration.title: Real-time Collaboration
collaboration.description: Work simultaneously with your team on shared documents and files.

analytics.title: Detailed Analytics
analytics.description: Complete dashboard with usage, storage and team activity metrics.

pricing.title: YOUR INFORMATION ALWAYS UNDER YOUR CONTROL
pricing.description: Unlike traditional public clouds, Nextcloud grants you absolute sovereignty over your data. You decide where it is stored and who accesses it, under an end-to-end encrypted environment. Maintain regulatory compliance without sacrificing agility, ensuring your intellectual property never leaves your infrastructure.

pro.name: Professional
pro.description: Ideal for professionals and small teams

testimonials.title: NEXTCLOUD HUB
testimonials.description: A Suite with everything your company needs, all in one place
testimonials.subtitle: Nextcloud Files
testimonials.paragraph1:
Nextcloud Files provides an on-premises universal file synchronization and access platform with powerful collaboration capabilities and desktop, mobile, and web interfaces.
It makes it easy to sync, share, and collaborate on your files without data leaks to third parties and while maintaining full control over your data.
benefits: Access from any device and location
Secure data and no information leaks

1.name: Maria Gonzalez
1.text: Nubetic completely transformed the way we work. The speed and security are unmatched.

2.text: We migrated 50TB without any issues. The technical support is exceptional and always available.

3.name: Ana Martinez
3.text: As a designer, I need fast access to large files. Nubetic gives me exactly that and more.
